vocab.context_meaning: 世界，指地球或人类生活的整体环境，常用于泛指所有人或事物
examples: The message was broadcast to the entire world via satellite.
Printing 'Hello, World!' is traditionally the first program a beginner writes.

vocab.context_meaning: 一种常见的问候语，用于打招呼或引起注意
examples: She said hello to everyone as she walked into the room.
He typed 'Hello, World!' as his first line of code.
